input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Many Hoplite examples use YAML, HOCON, JSON, or TOML; those require optional modules such as hoplite-yaml or hoplite-hocon. Generated tests should avoid relying on those formats unless the workflow intentionally adds a format module.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 resolves with only Kotlin/coroutines runtime dependencies and exposes meaningful core APIs directly: built-in decoders, data-class binding, MapPropertySource, system/environment property sources, and built-in .props/.properties parsing. Documentation says non-properties formats such as YAML/HOCON require separate Hoplite modules, but core coverage does not require them.
